4 - Alaska’s weird
3 - Alaska’s one and only house rep was preceded by a democrat whose plane went missing- and was never found, leading to emergency locators
2 - I had no idea that Alaska’s one and only congressional district has had one and only one representative since 1973
1 - I had no idea that Alaska just basically had one enormous congressional district (one of the largest electoral districts in the world)
